title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.195 - Records of examination, duty to keep
text:
354.195.  Records of examination, duty to keep. — Said director shall keep and preserve in a permanent form a full record of his proceedings, including a concise statement of the condition of every corporation subject to the provisions of sections 354.010 to 354.380 whose affairs he shall have examined.
(L. 1983 H.B. 127)
